title: Hiring Store Manager at La Opala

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at La Opala
jsonLd.description:
La Opala is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About La Opala:
La Opala is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
